content.en:
Practice!

Ye Tian was immersed in the process of refining and improving the Eternal Dao Seed, using the origin of the Black Leaf Demon Gold to refine his Eternal Dao Seed little by little, and finally raised the Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit.

"Finally raised the Eternal Dao to the limit!!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

He had now reached the limit of the Eternal Realm God Realm's mid-level peak cultivation, and he was only one step away from the Eternal Realm God Realm high-level cultivation, and he only needed to condense the seventh Eternal Realm Spirit, and his cultivation would break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm high-level realm.

He stabilized the Eternal Dao Seed a little, and he was ready to start breaking through.

Of course.

He also knew very well that if he wanted to break through, the success rate would not be very high, unless he prepared various resources to assist in condensing the spirit of the Eternal Realm.

However, his wife and children also need those resources, and if they use them themselves, they will be equivalent to one less.

Besides, if he fails to break through, it doesn't matter whatever, just change to a copy body.

So, he didn't need these resources urgently.

"Leave those resources to them, I can hit the bottleneck again and again!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Not long after, Ye Tian began to attack the high-level cultivation of the Eternal Realm God Realm, to condense the seventh perfection level of the 05 Eternal Realm Spirit.

The seventh Eternal Realm Spirit that Ye Tian chose was the Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance Method - the Xuan-Nether Giant Snake, once this perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit was condensed, he would awaken the Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Technique-Xuan-Netherworld Mist Domain, a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique.

This Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique is a realm-type Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, and once it is unleashed, it will form a vast realm, suppressing the enemy's strength and speed, which will be of great help in battle.

Of course, in the face of a powerful enemy, this Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, once it is broken, will be of little use.

It is only against enemies whose strength is similar to that of oneself, or weaker than oneself, that the effect of this Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique is extremely terrifying.

Therefore, this perfect-level Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique can only be said to be the icing on the cake, and it can't let its strength skyrocket.

If it weren't for that, he would have chosen this Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance Method a long time ago.

......

The Holy Kingdom of the Human Race, Ye Tian's own retreat.

He began to practice here in retreat, cultivating the method of the inheritance of the Xuanying Giant Serpent.

Time passed little by little, and after a long time, the phantom of the Xuanying Giant Snake appeared on Ye Tian's body.

However, it didn't take long for this illusory shadow to shatter, and Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed became extremely weak, and cracks appeared, which was a case of failure to break through.

"Sure enough, it's not so easy to break through, even if my foundation is perfect, the difficulty of breaking through will not change. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he changed into a duplicate body and continued to cultivate the method of inheritance of the Xuanying Giant Snake.

Another long time has passed.

On this day, Ye Tian failed to break through again.

However, he didn't have any worries, anyway, he could break through countless times, which was also his advantage, while other Eternal Realm God Realms didn't have such an opportunity.

In this way, time flies, and countless years have passed.

Ye Tian has failed again and again, and he has summed up his experience again and again, and he is more confident in the next breakthrough.

Before you know it, tens of billions of solstice years have passed.

Another breakthrough.

He avoided all the risks that might go wrong, practiced extremely seriously, and finally completed the most crucial process of condensation.

Rumble!!!!!

The half-finished Xuanying Giant Snake Realm Spirit condensed by Ye Tian frantically absorbed his Eternal Dao power, as well as absorbed the energy of the outside world.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian was very excited, which meant that his chance of breaking through was greatly improved, and as long as there were no accidents in the future, he would completely break through.

In an instant, he took out various resources, all of which provided energy to ensure that the condensed Xuanying Giant Snake would not collapse due to lack of energy.

Gradually, the Xuanying Giant Snake Realm Spirit was born, and it continued to grow, growing to the same extent as other Eternal Realm Spirits, and that was the time when it really broke through.

Another time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Xuanying Giant Snake Realm Spirit was completely successfully conceived, perfectly formed, and would not collapse again.

It's just that Ye Tian at this time is extremely weak, and the Eternal Dao Seed is also very weak, so he can barely break through. []

And his Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, the Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, the Xuan Ying Mist Domain, was also successfully awakened and completely mastered by him.

"It's too difficult to break through without relying on any resources, just by yourself, that is, I can hit the bottleneck again and again, and it is completely impossible to break through if I am another realm god. Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, at the level of the high-level realm god of the Eternal Realm God Realm, every breakthrough has to consume countless resources to assist the breakthrough, and there is only a little hope, and it may not be able to break through.

This is also the reason why so many high-level realm gods are not short of resources, but they are all difficult to break through.

It's not that they don't have enough time to cultivate, they don't have enough foundation, and they don't lack resources, but the success rate of breaking through is really too low, and sometimes they can only rely on luck.

If you're lucky, you might succeed in a few breakthroughs, but if you're unlucky, you may never succeed.

In the next 690 days, Ye Tian slowly recovered his Eternal Dao Seed, and in the process of recovery, he nourished the Eternal Realm Spirit little by little.

He found that the origin of the Black Leaf Demon Gold could also quickly restore the Eternal Dao Seed, but he didn't use it much, after all, he had to keep it for his wife and children, so he slowly restored his Eternal Dao Seed and used other resources to restore it.

Although the recovery speed is a little slower, at least those black leaf magic gold will be left!

This time, in order to restore the Eternal Dao Seed, Ye Tian used up 80 billion years to the Dao Era, which shows how weak his Eternal Dao Seed is.

But eventually, he recovered.

"Strength, my current strength is far beyond the past!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The high-level cultivation of the Eternal Realm God Realm, seven perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirits, and seven perfect-level Eternal Realm Spiritual Techniques, which made his combat power extremely terrifying.

It can be said that in terms of combat effectiveness, he may not be weaker than the high-level realm god who has condensed the nine eternal realm spirits, the Guya realm god.

You must know that such strength is already the top existence in the Dongwu realm.

In other words, Ye Tian's combat power is placed in the Dongwu Realm, and it is possible that he is already invincible.

Of course, if there is a more powerful high-level realm god hidden, it will be difficult to say.
